translations.idev.step1.title: Describe Your Idea
translations.idev.step1.description: Tell IDEV what you want to build. Describe your app in plain language — no technical expertise required.
translations.idev.step2.title: AI Generates Code
translations.idev.step2.description: Our AI agents analyze your idea and generate a complete, production-ready application with frontend, backend, and database.
translations.idev.step3.title: Iterate & Deploy
translations.idev.step3.description: Preview your app in real-time, make adjustments through conversation, and deploy instantly with iDeploy.
translations.idev.feature1.title: Full-Stack Generation
translations.idev.feature1.description: Complete React/Next.js applications with API routes, database models, and authentication.
translations.idev.feature2.title: Real-Time Preview
translations.idev.feature2.description: See your application come to life as the AI builds it, with instant hot-reload preview.
translations.idev.feature3.title: AI-Driven Iteration
translations.idev.feature3.description: Refine your app through natural language. Simply describe changes and the AI applies them.
translations.idev.feature4.title: Modern Tech Stack
translations.idev.feature4.description: Built with industry-standard technologies: React, Next.js, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, and more.
translations.idev.feature5.title: Export & Own
translations.idev.feature5.description: Export your complete source code. You own everything — no vendor lock-in, no restrictions.
translations.idev.feature6.title: iDeploy Integration
translations.idev.feature6.description: Seamlessly deploy your generated application with one click through the iDeploy platform.
translations.idev.seo.title: IDEV — AI App Generator & Code Builder by Idem
translations.idev.seo.description: Transform your idea into a SaaS or mobile application with IDEV. The intelligent application generator of the Idem ecosystem. Clean React/Next.js code, digital sovereignty, and instant deployment.
